photosynthesis.note: Photosynthesis is fundamentally 'plant + light interaction to make life energy.' lu (LIGHT) + fa (PLANT) captures the essential mechanism. A more explicit version could be lufa li ma (LIGHT PLANT ALIVE MORE) to emphasize the growth/vitalization aspect, but lufa alone is sufficiently transparent for a technical concept grounded in observable physical primitives. The composition avoids the Greek roots (photo- = light, synthesis = putting together) and instead uses NSM naturalistic primitives that any speaker could intuitively relate to the biological reality.
